author: Tushar D.
pros: A good product for Tracking employee attendance
cons: I am still evaluating the product. I will post the cons as soon as I find out.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Implementation of the software in our organisation has enabled us to Swiftly plan work shifts and ensure permission based access.
author: Lucia B.
pros: Effectiveness of the software in employees scheduling and tracking. Implementation of the software is super easy.
cons: The software is very effective. No drawbacks.

review_title: Tracksmart Attendance - needs some feature updates
description: We have not noticed any updates to Tracksmart since we began using it 3 years ago. I am considering looking for something else.
author: Tara S.
pros: We have been using Track Smart for 3 years. Generally it is easy for employees to enter time and PTOs. The reports are ok.
cons: If there is a change to be made, all employees have to come to the administrator to make the change. I wish we could eliminate all the extra banks of time... we only use PTO so I have to go in a manage it every month if the supervisors don't select the correct bank. PTOs for time off are counted on the first day of the time off. We pay bi-monthly so this has messed up some hourly workers - for example if an employee takes 5 days off and it starts on the 14th and ends on the 19th - all of the time off will go onto the 14th. The Supervisors do not receive notification when a time sheet is submitted.

review_title: Easy to use and helps keep track of time-off approvals.
author: Prashant B.
pros: Easy-to-use design You just fill out one simple form on a single screen to make a request. On the same screen, you can also check your past requests and see if they are approved.
cons: A better mobile app would help manage entries and requests easily
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Love the way it keeps my office organized!
description: Time off requests have never so easy! Daily reminders of birthdays, employee anniversaries, and conflicting appointments make it easy to never forget something important again! I would highly recommend this program to anyone!
author: Diane K.
pros: Reminders!!
cons: I wish time off requests or any important dates were emailed as a reminder 24 hours prior to the event.

description: I have a large staff and so changing organizational systems is always a little nerve wracking. TrackSmart Attendance was surprisingly easy to implement, and I got very little push back from staff. So overall, I've been VERY pleased with it. It also has a good price point.
author: Melanie C.
pros: I've used several attendance tracker programs, and TrackSmart has been one of the easiest and most flexible that I've experienced. I especially appreciate two things: 1. it is easy to use without a lot of managerial administration and 2. it is a great way to track paid time off. The system is very easy to set up to work with most organizational time off policies.
cons: There was very little in terms of drawbacks of this software. It is flexible enough to work with our PTO policy and it is very easy in terms of manager administration and employee use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Angela W.
pros: Tracksmart is great for small business! We have a staff of under 20 and use the Attendance to track time in and out for each employee.
cons: Tracksmart is great the only thing I would change is the the way the 40hr week is split up. Once it's submitted you can't go back.

review_title: Track smart is awesome, my company has been using it for 3 years now.
author: Angela W.
pros: What i like most about the track smart software is it is extremely easy to navigate. Users in the office do not have any issues recording their time
cons: The least thing I find less admirable about the tracksmart software is the way the overtime is calculated

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I really like the ability to track all of the different leaves that our employees are eligible for. This makes it very easy for me to process the leave information in payroll and gives me the confidence to know that leave balances are accurate.
cons: There's not really much of anything that I don't like about this software. It provides for what I need.

review_title: Don't Waste Your Time; Time means Value
description: Its awesome; it could not be described in words; just try it; your Expense seems Best Returns
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: you should take care of your business but for the Valuable Clients. Believe me you will be best in market
cons: Easy to Use and Convenient to Your Valued Clients. it is one time investment to take next step for you business Development.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: TrackSmart has vastly improved our PTO system. Gone are the days of manually tracking on excel spreadsheets, countless disputes from employees who think their balance should be higher than what it is and so on. The only thing I REALLY wish I could do on TrackSmart is load PTO banks for the coming year before the year starts (i.e. I wish I could load the 2017 time banks and approve 2017 time off requests... instead they just have to sit as pending until after 1/1/2017).
author: Kathleen M.
pros: Employees can keep track of their own PTO balances rather than dispute with managers. They can also see their balances so it reduces the number of inquiries management receives.
cons: Inability to load next year's time bank before the year hits.

review_title: Great Software, Updates would make it even better
description: I use track smart for our business of 50 employees. It has freed up time for processing and tracking vacation accruals for sure. It also makes it a breeze to see who else is off when you receive a vacation request. Potential conflicts or other company events that may be going on. This is wonderful and leaves little room for conflicting vacation schedules. One improvement that could be made to make life easier for the admin is to have each employees time off bank balances show on the employee list screen. So that I don't have to research each employee individually to find balances. A quick glance at the employee screen for that important info would be great! Otherwise a great software.
author: Stacey G.
pros: How easy it is for employees to input their requests
cons: Managers cannot edit or adjust their employee requests for them.

review_title: Try it before you judge it!
description: I would highly recommend tracksmart to small and large corporations. The accuracy of data, the ease of use and most of all the multiplicity of reports. It made my job so easy as appose to the archaic method I was using, by putting the time off on a color-coded calendar. I like the fact that the employees can access the site as well and input time off data. A good management of time for all concerned for such a nominal cost. Less than a full-time employees salary.
author: Athlyn F.
pros: the various reports
cons: The profile page could be a little more adaptable regarding navigation

author: Kris H.
pros: Employee's like the mobile app and how easy it is to request time off. As an administrator I like all the available reports and that I can download them as Excel documents for easy editing.
cons: As an admin I don't like that we cannot modify the time off banks. The only one we use is "PTO" and I'm having to constantly go in and modify accepted time to reflect the correct time off bank otherwise the employee's accrual will be wrong.

description: TrackSmart is user-friendly! We have efficiently streamlined our record keeping & communication with employees by moving to TrackSmart. We've also eliminated our time clock for hourly employees. Saving time & money :)
author: Sarah M.
pros: User-friendly both with the web version & the app.
cons: Wish we had the ability to customize our accrual banks just a little bit more. Contract employee (teachers) calendar year run differently than administrative & hourly employees.

description: Tracksmart is user friendly, accurate, and inexpensive. Great product for our size office. Offers webinars to keep me updated on regulations. Friendly and helpful customer service. I recommend it.
author: Beth M.
pros: Easy setup - ease of use
cons: Attendance information goes away at year end. Terrible! There should be a way to retrieve year end information even after it has cleared out for January.

review_title: Great tool for HR managers and similar professions.
description: Great software for the price and it is easy to use regardless of computer skills.
author: Luke M.
pros: It is very easy to manage and use. The report generator is a great add. The cost vs. other systems is good too.
cons: When rolling this out in my facility, there was a bug in the system. The bug changed the number of hours that were previously entered. This made some very, very happy and other very, very mad. It has since been fixed but still not a great way to roll out new software.

description: We find TrackSmart an easy way to keep everyone informed of individual and company events. The software is easy to use and very flexible.
author: David R.
pros: Easy to use
cons: At times the program gets hung up requiring a restart to clear the issue. It would also be nice if the software rejected an approval if the individual does not have time remaining.

description: As small business managers often wear many hats. In my case, HR is one of mine. I am very pleased with TrackSmart and the ability to record all the necessary areas for my 12 employees. The price is very reasonable and I will continue to be a customer.
author: Seth H.
pros: Ease of use
cons: Some of the trackings could be more specific

description: I've found track smart to be very helpful in small business to track vacation and sick paid time off. At this point, I can't imagine not using it.
author: Kim M.
pros: Tracking paid time off
cons: The reports. 1 report that shows each employee name, what dates they have taken off, how many they have left which is run by the hire date would be helpful. The systems have this information but on separate reports.

description: Great tool to take the work out of managing time off requests, calendaring, and totaling time sheets!
author: Jasmine V.
pros: The reports will save you time in the short term and long term.
cons: Can take some time to teach new hires how to use.

description: I would reccommend this to anyone looking for an attendance program. Very easy to use, easy to set up new employees, and nice reporting.
author: Sarah N.
pros: It is easy to set up and easy to track attendance.
cons: I wish there were some different options on the drop down lists. I can't seem to get it to track our vacation and personal days the way ours are set up.

description: SmartTrack is a very user-friendly program. I have been using it for several years now. I have never had any issues with the program or with customer service.
author: Brenda B.
pros: User-friendly

description: It has being good. Overall it is a great online software that permits you to control your firm employees absences.
author: Raiko B.
pros: Online, easy to use.
cons: Expensive.

description: I love tracksmart attendance. The notes field is the most helpful and the reports are easy to run. I'm an HR department of 1, so this software makes my job easier.
author: Deborah G.
pros: ease of use, reporting features
cons: sometimes the system is down
